name: n8n-workflows
description: Advanced Model Context Protocol server for seamless n8n workflow integration and automation management
author: carlosjperez

tools.name: execute_workflow
tools.description: Execute an n8n workflow by ID or name with optional input data

tools.name: list_workflows
tools.description: List all available workflows with optional filtering

tools.name: get_workflow
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific workflow

tools.name: get_execution_status
tools.description: Get the status and details of a workflow execution

tools.name: list_executions
tools.description: List recent workflow executions with optional filtering

tools.name: create_webhook
tools.description: Create a webhook URL for a workflow
